source_intake_record.raw_question_text: For the circuit shown in Fig. 3.35, the coupling coefficient of mutual inductance for the two coils $L_{1}$ and $L_{2}$ is unity. Find the instantaneous current $i(t)$ the oscillator must deliver as a function of its frequency.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object string representation rather than a file path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image object string representation rather than a file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式写明“circuit shown in Fig. 3.35”，电路拓扑依赖配图才能完整确定。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要不在纯文本中。
问题涉及互感线圈 L1、L2 与振荡器输出电流，缺少图像时很难还原连接关系。
multi_step: 需要先从电路图识别含互感的等效关系，再结合 coupling coefficient 为 unity 建模。
答案不是单个数值，而是随频率变化的瞬时电流表达式，包含幅值阻抗 Z 和相位 phi 两部分。
求解通常涉及至少阻抗化简、谐振/频率项组合、再写出时域电流三步。
verifiability: answer_present=true，且给出了明确的解析式，包括 i(t)、Z、phi 的定义。
该类电路题答案可通过电路方程或符号推导核验，结果形式较规范。
registry_passed=true，说明资产登记通过，题面与答案基本可用于后续检查。

extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object string representation rather than a file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain:
Let the currents of the primary and secondary circuits be $I_{1}$ and $I_{2}$ respectively. We have
$$
 egin{aligned}
\dot{V} &= \dot{I}_{1} R+L_{1}\ddot{I}_{1}+M\ddot{I}_{2}\
0 &= L_{2}\ddot{I}_{2}+M\ddot{I}_{1}+ rac{I_{2}}{C}
\end{aligned}
$$
Solving for $I_{1}\sim\exp(j\omega t)$, we have
$$
 egin{aligned}
I_{1} &=  rac{V}{R+j\left(\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{1}{\delta}-\omega^{2}L_{2}ight)} \ 
&=  rac{V_{0}e^{-j\varphi}}{\sqrt{R^{2}+\left(\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{1}{e}-\omega^{2}L_{2}ight)^{2}}}
\end{aligned}
$$
where
$$
\varphi=\arctan\left( rac{\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{c}{}-\omega^{2}L_{2}}}{R}ight)
$$
is the phase angle of the input current with respect to the driving voltage. Applying the given conditions $L_{1}=L_{2}=M=L$, we have
$$
 egin{array}{l}
I_{1}= rac{V_{0}e^{-j\varphi}}{\sqrt{R^{2}+\left( rac{\omega L}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)^{2}}} \
\varphi=\arctan\left( rac{\omega L/R}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)
\end{array}
$$
or, taking the real part,
$$
i_{1}(t)= rac{V_{0}}{Z}\cos(\omega t-\varphi),
$$
with
$$
Z=\sqrt{R^{2}+\left( rac{\omega L}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)^{2}}.
$$

problem_main_record.reasoning_chain:
Let the currents of the primary and secondary circuits be $I_{1}$ and $I_{2}$ respectively. We have
$$
 egin{aligned}
\dot{V} &= \dot{I}_{1} R+L_{1}\ddot{I}_{1}+M\ddot{I}_{2}\
0 &= L_{2}\ddot{I}_{2}+M\ddot{I}_{1}+ rac{I_{2}}{C}
\end{aligned}
$$
Solving for $I_{1}\sim\exp(j\omega t)$, we have
$$
 egin{aligned}
I_{1} &=  rac{V}{R+j\left(\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{1}{\delta}-\omega^{2}L_{2}ight)} \ 
&=  rac{V_{0}e^{-j\varphi}}{\sqrt{R^{2}+\left(\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{1}{e}-\omega^{2}L_{2}ight)^{2}}}
\end{aligned}
$$
where
$$
\varphi=\arctan\left( rac{\omega L_{1}+ rac{\omega^{3}M^{2}}{ rac{c}{}-\omega^{2}L_{2}}}{R}ight)
$$
is the phase angle of the input current with respect to the driving voltage. Applying the given conditions $L_{1}=L_{2}=M=L$, we have
$$
 egin{array}{l}
I_{1}= rac{V_{0}e^{-j\varphi}}{\sqrt{R^{2}+\left( rac{\omega L}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)^{2}}} \
\varphi=\arctan\left( rac{\omega L/R}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)
\end{array}
$$
or, taking the real part,
$$
i_{1}(t)= rac{V_{0}}{Z}\cos(\omega t-\varphi),
$$
with
$$
Z=\sqrt{R^{2}+\left( rac{\omega L}{1-\omega^{2}LC}ight)^{2}}.
$$
